response.justification: Wei Chen has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS)
Active open-source contributor with demonstrable system design and mentoring skills
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
AI experience appears incidental rather than core focus; duration of production AI work unclear
Lacks documented leadership in customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise AI deployment
